🙌🙌 @amasad love what yall are doing. been working on a Replit app project with my friend 🫡🫡


Amjad Masad (@amasad)

Software isn’t merely technical work anymore. It’s creative.

Introducing Replit Agent 4. The first AI built for creative collaboration between humans and agents.

Design on an infinite canvas, work with your team, run parallel agents, and ship working apps, sites, slides & more.

posts.text:
The price of gas has gone up $0.47 and the price of diesel has gone up $0.83 in 10 days due to War with Iran.

and waging war costs American taxpayers about $1 billion per day,

which comes out to $10 per family per day, or $100 since the war began. 

This isn’t America First.
